area.value: up to 3 creatures, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: You must have a bardic performance in effect to cast this spell. With a flourish, you immediately end your bardic performance, assaulting the senses of the targets with your finale. Each target is stunned for 1 round. On a successful Saving Throw, a target is staggered for 1 round. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide. Copyright 2010, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Author: Jason Bulmahn.
